<!-- markdownlint-disable-next-line MD041 -->
## Summary

- One to three bullets describing the change at the intent level.

## Related issue

- Link the related issue, or write "N/A".

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / maintenance
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] Automated checks pass locally
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff
- [ ] Updated documentation where relevant
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or real user data committed

## Notes

Anything reviewers should know: trade-offs, follow-up work, or areas to focus review on.
